skill.name: chat-ui
skill.description: Chat UI building blocks for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Components: container, messages, input, typing indicators, avatars. Capabilities: chat interfaces, message lists, input handling, streaming. Use for: building custom chat UIs, messaging interfaces, AI assistants.
skill.summary: React and Next.js chat interface components with shadcn/ui design tokens for building messaging applications.
skill.author: inferen-sh

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 28 patterns that are all false positives. Markdown code block delimiters (```) were incorrectly detected as shell backtick execution. URLs are documentation links, not runtime network calls. No cryptographic code exists. This is a legitimate React UI component library documentation file with no security concerns.

medium_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Code Block Delimiters
medium_findings.description: Static analyzer detected 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' but these are Markdown code fence delimiters (```bash, ```tsx) used for documentation, not shell execution backticks. No command injection risk exists.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Documentation URLs
low_findings.description: Hardcoded URLs detected are documentation and CDN links in markdown content (ui.inference.sh, inference.sh). These are reference links for users, not runtime network requests made by code.

content.user_title: Build React Chat Interfaces with Prebuilt Components
content.value_statement: Creating chat UIs from scratch requires significant time and design effort. This skill provides ready-to-use React components with shadcn/ui styling for rapid chat interface development.
actual_capabilities: Generate ChatContainer component code for wrapping chat message lists
Create ChatMessage components with user, assistant, and system role variants
Implement ChatInput components with submit handlers and loading states
Add TypingIndicator components for real-time AI response feedback
Assemble complete chat interface examples with state management
Provide shadcn/ui styled components with Tailwind CSS customization
limitations: Components are UI-only and do not include backend API integration
Requires existing React or Next.js project with shadcn/ui configured
Does not provide message persistence or database connectivity
Streaming support requires separate implementation of server-side streaming

use_cases.title: AI Assistant Chat Interface
use_cases.description: Build a conversational interface for AI assistants with message history, typing indicators, and streaming response display.

use_cases.title: Customer Support Widget
use_cases.description: Create embedded customer support chat widgets with professional styling and message threading.
use_cases.target_user: Frontend engineers adding support features to web applications

use_cases.title: Internal Team Communication Tool
use_cases.description: Rapidly prototype team messaging interfaces with role-based message styling and input handling.
use_cases.target_user: Startup teams building internal collaboration tools

prompt_templates.title: Basic Chat Component Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a basic chat interface using the chat-ui components with a ChatContainer, sample ChatMessage components for user and assistant roles, and a ChatInput for sending messages.
prompt_templates.scenario: You need a simple chat UI skeleton for a new project.

prompt_templates.title: Full Chat Application with State
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a complete chat component with React state management. Include message history array, loading state for AI responses, TypingIndicator display during processing, and proper message submission handling.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building a production-ready chat interface with dynamic message updates.

prompt_templates.title: Custom Styled Chat Messages
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate ChatMessage components with custom Tailwind CSS styling. Show different background colors, avatar displays, and timestamp formatting for user versus assistant messages.
prompt_templates.scenario: Customizing the visual appearance of chat messages to match brand design.

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Modal Chat Interface
prompt_templates.prompt: Extend the chat-ui components to support code blocks, markdown rendering in messages, file attachment indicators, and action buttons within chat messages. Include the full component structure with necessary imports.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building an advanced chat interface that supports rich content beyond plain text.

output_examples.input: Create a chat input that shows a loading spinner when disabled
output_examples.output: A ChatInput component with disabled prop bound to isLoading state, displaying a spinner icon and muted styling when messages are being processed.

output_examples.input: Show how to display a typing indicator while waiting for AI response
output_examples.output: Conditional rendering pattern: {isLoading && <TypingIndicator />} placed between the message list and ChatInput, with animated dots showing AI is generating a response.

best_practices: Always wrap chat components in ChatContainer for consistent layout and styling
Use distinct role values (user, assistant, system) for proper message alignment and styling
Implement loading states with TypingIndicator to provide user feedback during AI processing
anti_patterns: Do not hardcode messages in production code - use state management for dynamic content
Avoid blocking the UI thread during message submission - use async handlers with loading states
Do not skip accessibility attributes - ensure chat messages have proper ARIA labels for screen readers

faq.question: What frameworks does this chat-ui skill support?
faq.answer: This skill provides React and Next.js components using TypeScript. Components are styled with Tailwind CSS and integrate with shadcn/ui design tokens.

faq.question: Do these components include backend API integration?
faq.answer: No, these are UI components only. You need to implement your own API calls for sending messages and receiving AI responses. The examples show placeholder comments for API integration points.

faq.question: Can I customize the appearance of chat messages?
faq.answer: Yes, all components accept className props for Tailwind CSS customization. Components use shadcn/ui design tokens that can be overridden with custom styles.

faq.question: How do I add message timestamps to the chat?
faq.answer: Extend the ChatMessage component to accept a timestamp prop and render it within the message bubble. Use JavaScript Date formatting or a library like date-fns for formatting.

faq.question: Is streaming response support included?
faq.answer: The components support displaying streaming content by updating message state incrementally. You need to implement the streaming logic on your backend and update React state as chunks arrive.

faq.question: Are these components accessible?
faq.answer: The base components follow accessibility best practices with semantic HTML. For full accessibility, add ARIA labels to messages, ensure keyboard navigation for ChatInput, and announce new messages to screen readers.
